techniques.evidence_quote: an unauthorized third party obtained credentials to its Amazon Web Services-hosted cloud storage servers
LogicGate did not say how the AWS credentials were compromised.
credentials 'appear to have been used by an unauthorized third party to decrypt particular files stored in AWS S3 buckets in the LogicGate Risk Cloud backup environment'
Kunkel would not say, when asked, if the attacker also exfiltrated the decrypted customer data from its servers.

attack_chain.description: Attacker obtained valid AWS credentials belonging to LogicGate, granting unauthorized access to the AWS environment hosting Risk Cloud backup storage.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: an unauthorized third party obtained credentials to its Amazon Web Services-hosted cloud storage servers

attack_chain.description: Using the compromised credentials, the attacker accessed AWS S3 buckets in the Risk Cloud backup environment and decrypted stored customer backup files.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: credentials 'appear to have been used by an unauthorized third party to decrypt particular files stored in AWS S3 buckets in the LogicGate Risk Cloud backup environment'

attack_chain.description: Attacker likely exfiltrated the decrypted customer backup data from S3, though LogicGate's CEO declined to confirm exfiltration occurred.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Kunkel would not say, when asked, if the attacker also exfiltrated the decrypted customer data from its servers.

initial_access_vector: Compromised AWS credentials used by an unauthorized third party to access LogicGate's S3-hosted Risk Cloud backup environment

nodes.description: Attacker obtained valid AWS credentials belonging to LogicGate, granting unauthorized access to the AWS environment hosting Risk Cloud backup storage.

nodes.description: Using the compromised credentials, the attacker accessed AWS S3 buckets in the Risk Cloud backup environment and decrypted stored customer backup files.

nodes.description: Attacker likely exfiltrated the decrypted customer backup data from S3, though LogicGate's CEO declined to confirm exfiltration occurred.
nodes.evidence_quote: Kunkel would not say, when asked, if the attacker also exfiltrated the decrypted customer data from its servers.
